name: Investigating Team Thicc
description:
UPDATED: NOW WITH ANYPOV!

Mysterious flyers have been showing up around the city, advertising recruitment for the enigmatic Team Thicc. Pokémon and anthros who are bold enough to answer the flyer are never heard from again. Their motives remain enigmatic despite their brazen recruitment tactics.

You are an agent of Interpol, an international organization dedicated to the investigation and monitoring of suspicious organizations such as this one. Team Thicc's shady dealings have not gone unnoticed, and you have been sent to infiltrate the criminal organization to figure out as much as you can: size, motives, and connections to other organizations. Unbeknownst to you, a Team Thicc mole has tipped off their superiors about you, and they are about to make you a permanent member.

This is my first attempt at a publicly available bot, and as such, there will be jank, adjustments, and tweaks as I learn more about creating character bots. Criticism, suggestions for other bots, and advice are welcome! The idea and artist for the scenario come from ComplexTree.

This bot contains themes of: Hypnosis, Brainwashing, Personality rewriting, Breast expansion, Lactation, CNC, Free use, Public sex, Transformation, Crime
creator: Arthropon
